phase3_findings.description: review-gate read-mechanism failure asymmetry (promoted from iter-1 shadow)

fix_decisions.claim_text: gate routes value-shape but not read-mechanism failures — fail-open on gh read hiccup
fix_decisions.evidence: genuine fail-open (gate silently opens when a gh read fails), not an over-grade: fails OPEN not closed; Important (discipline backstop, not data-loss; edit-time routing is the primary prevention). Confirmed and applied.

post_shadow_delta_review.note: Loop Exit post-shadow edit gate: the iter-2 gate read-failure fix landed after the early shadow; blinded delta-review of 05042b8..HEAD returned clean/APPROVE, byte-identity preserved. reviewed_sha advanced to HEAD.
